title: Rio, 40 Degrees
writer: Nelson Pereira dos Santos, Arnaldo de Farias
actors: Modesto De Souza, Roberto Bataglin, Jece Valadão
plot: A semi-documentary on the people of Rio de Janeiro. The camera follows boys from a hillside shanty town who sell peanuts at Copacabana, Sugar Loaf Mountain, and a soccer game. Various subplots, involving characters they meet along...
